docket_entries.description: WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BARAKAT, SOFIAN
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BARAKAT, SOFIAN
NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION; NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO CLAIM OF EXEMPTION & CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FILED.
THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY SAAD, MARY AS TO DEFENDANT BARAKAT, SOFIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-14-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
PLTF'S DECLARATION REQUEST FOR AN EARLIER COURT DATE FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAAD, MARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARAKAT, SOFIAN $2,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,215.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BARAKAT, SOFIAN
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION CONTINUED FROM APR-23-1998 TO MAY-14-1998 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506 AS TO DEFENDANT BARAKAT, SOFIAN
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF MAY-14-1998, DENIED AS TO DEFENDANT BARAKAT, SOFIAN
NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS TO DEFENDANT BARAKAT, SOFIAN HEARING SET FOR APR-23-1998 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
WRIT TO SAN MATEO COUNTY RETURNED RELEASED BY BANKRUPTCY. ALSO NO ORIGINAL WRIT RETURNED FROM SHERIFF, ONLY COPY WITH STATEMENT OF NO COLLECTION
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $422.50 AS TO DEFENDANT BARAKAT, SOFIAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BARAKAT, SOFIAN
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $250.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $96.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT BARAKAT, SOFIAN
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FILED.
A REPRESENTATIVE FOR PLTF, MARY SAAD STIPULATED WITH DEFT TO HAVE CASE CONTINUED TO 5/14/98. PLTF OUT OF STATE ON AN EMERGENCY.
